title: PSF Yours: Building Your Exclusive AI Models and Digital Assets
intro_p1: The AI generation wave has arrived, but it brings a fundamental dilemma: Are you building 'assets' or accumulating 'liabilities'?
intro_p2: When your team uploads precious original characters, creative manuscripts, and brand designs to general-purpose models like ChatGPT and Midjourney, you're using your most valuable data to train a 'public brain' that doesn't belong to you and isn't under your control.
intro_p3: Once entered into these general large models, your original content becomes training data for others. This isn't collaboration—it's a one-way loss of digital assets.
liabilities_intro: General-purpose large models are 'public squares' that bring three major liabilities:
liability_1: IP Liability: Your data is 'consumed and digested,' making asset ownership ambiguous.
liability_2: Style Liability: Your brand visuals and style characteristics are diluted by 'AI averaging,' losing uniqueness.
liability_3: Workflow Liability: Your team is forced to adapt to rigid AI tool processes, rather than the other way around.
mission: The mission of PSF Yours is to transform your 'AI liabilities' into 'proprietary AI assets.' We don't provide SaaS services—we forge digital assets exclusively for you.
pillar_1_title: Value Pillar I: Absolute Asset Security and Sovereignty
pillar_1_intro: Your original content will always be yours. We ensure your asset sovereignty through two key strategies: 'local deployment' and 'data isolation.'
pillar_1_point_1: Local Deployment and Sovereignty: Your data and original materials never need to go online. Our specialized training strategy (QAT quantization technology) can optimize your exclusive model to run smoothly on a consumer-grade laptop with just an Nvidia RTX 3060. This enables completely offline operation, eliminating theft risks—something large general models cannot achieve.
pillar_1_point_2: Data Isolation and Purity: Your creativity and requirements are no longer subject to the norms and restrictions of general large models. Giants like OpenAI mix all data together for training, causing data contamination and style interference. PSF Yours uses LoRA, Reinforcement Learning (RL), and Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) technologies to create independent, exclusive small models for your characters, scenes, objects, and functions, ensuring data purity and style consistency.
pillar_1_point_3: Asset Protection and Evidence: Since you retain the original training data and local model, you can easily provide evidence in future copyright disputes. Additionally, the images we generate have highly reorganized data structures, making them extremely difficult to be stolen or trained on by others.
pillar_2_title: Value Pillar II: Seamless Customized Workflow
pillar_2_intro: We make AI adapt to your workflow, not the other way around. General large models are 'aircraft carriers'—difficult to turn; your exclusive model is a 'missile speedboat'—precise and agile. Through 'customized workflow nodes,' we seamlessly embed AI into your existing production pipeline:
workflow_automation_1: Automatically add company logos or watermarks
workflow_automation_2: Force output of specific copyright notices
workflow_automation_3: Automatically adjust to corporate-standard sizes and formats (e.g., CMYK)
workflow_integration_1: Connect with existing design review processes
workflow_integration_2: Integrate with internal asset management systems
workflow_quality_1: Automatically filter results that don't meet brand standards
pillar_3_title: Value Pillar III: Ultimate Data and Model Performance
pillar_3_point_1: Data Alchemy (Core Barrier): We can process your messy, complex raw data. Through comprehensive data cleaning and optimization (deblurring, intelligent annotation, object integrity preservation, etc.), our models outperform competitors with the same amount of data. This is key technology that most clients cannot handle themselves.
pillar_3_point_2: Evolvable Models (Living Assets): Your model is 'alive.' Like a game character, it can continuously absorb new data, growing from level 10 to level 100. We'll select the most suitable base model for fine-tuning and adaptation, allowing your model to evolve with your needs and establish competitive barriers that others cannot surpass.
model_type_1: Style Transfer: Learn and pay homage to your favorite creative styles and characteristics, enjoying creative freedom without infringing on others' copyrights.
model_type_2: Super Fusion: An advanced version of style transfer that pioneers the fusion of different styles to create stunning new effects, elevating your creative and generative experience to unprecedented heights.
model_type_3: Custom Projects: Based on the functions and features needed in your professional field, adjusted according to your special requirements to create the most suitable exclusive model for you.
model_type_4: Original Twin: Your best AI avatar, helping you create characters and scenes as if drawn by your own hand. More importantly, it never gets tired and has endless new creativity.
model_type_5: R18 & NSFW: You know, the kind of model that can only be understood but not spoken of, exclusively yours and not for external distribution.
moat_title: Your AI Moat — The TSMC of AI Image Generation
moat_p1: We stand at a critical crossroads. You can choose to continue feeding your most precious creative assets to 'public brains' like ChatGPT and Midjourney, hoping they won't turn against you. Or you can make a strategic choice: build your own 'private brain.'
moat_p2: PSF Yours positions itself as the TSMC of AI image generation. We don't design chips (base models) ourselves, but we have the most unique 'manufacturing process.'
moat_p3: We use the most advanced open-source models and our proprietary data cleaning, training strategies, and workflow integration technologies to 'manufacture' compact, powerful, and fully customized 'AI chips' (your exclusive models) for you.
moat_p4: This chip (PSF model) serves only you, can run only on your devices, and belongs exclusively to you.
moat_p5: This is the exclusive digital asset that PSF Yours creates for you.
moat_p6: This is your most powerful and unshakeable moat in the AI era.
